items.text: Read context: tool-token-ingestion/decisions.md + env.md in full
Read squire-storage/decisions.md's SquireInvokeTool redirect section in full (original full-cutover framing)

Read the actual code in full: squire.rs (SquireInvokeTool, SquireStore trait, TokenDetail/NewTokenSpec/StoredToken, ingest_tool_registry/tool_token_id/tool_full_desc), streaming_cmd.rs's per-turn ToolRegistry construction, mcp/mod.rs (discover_tools/call_tool/McpServerConfig/StdioMcpClient)
Verify baseline: cargo build + cargo test --lib clean, 210/210 passing
Make and document proportionality assessment in decisions.md before implementing: is full dispatch tractable/proportionate, or is a scoped-down diagnostic improvement the right call
Implement the chosen scope: ToolEndpoint enum + TokenDetail/NewTokenSpec endpoint field, both backends, ingestion endpoints side-channel map, SquireInvokeTool real dispatch branch
Add/update unit tests (both InMemorySquireStore and LanceDbSquireStore) — 7 new in squire.rs, 4 new in squire_lancedb.rs
Full verification: cargo build + cargo build --bins + cargo build --examples + cargo test --lib (221/221); repo-wide frontend grep confirming no WDIO/GUI surface warranted
Update root/Squire/state.md Child Nodes list and root/Squire/handoff.md to reflect this session's work, current build/test status, and remaining backlog
